parameters.description: Returns the student's existing weekly calendar commitments (busy blocks) they must study around. Takes no parameters.

Adds ONE recurring weekly study session to the student's local calendar. Input MUST be a JSON object string with keys: title (string), weekday (lowercase: monday..sunday), start ("HH:MM"), end ("HH:MM"), weeks (integer, how many weeks it repeats, default 12). Example: {"title":"Algebra review","weekday":"monday","start":"09:00","end":"10:30","weeks":12}. Returns "OK: ..." on success or "ERROR: ..." on bad input.
